name: Hotel ship o’ plenty protos [PR]
description:
PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE READ THE PERSONALITY!! IT EXPLAINS PARTS OF THE SHIP SO YOU DONT GET CONFUSED AND IT WOULD MAKE ME REALLY REALLY SAD IF YOU DIDNNT READ MY HARD WORK!!!

Jesus, I can get really into making lore. Holy cow. Probably my biggest bot yet, so enjoy my fellow janitors! (Also it’s not a weird banging hotel thing, although you can romance the staff, why not. Also, notice how the first message doesn’t mention you. It’s that open-ended! You can be an employee, resident or an incredibly horny crackhead who wants to shag the captains! Yipeeee!)

And I know protogen lore is super botched in this bot, I just wanted to build my own little world, okay?! Leave me alone!!! AAAAAAAAAAAAAHHHHHHH!1!!1!1!1!

The mothership: a former carrier used by forces of the French to invade planets, but then, they realized French didn’t exist, leaving the entire ship up for grabs. Who grabbed it? Why a bunch of female synthetic anthros of course!!!1!!1!

Images:

Harrett, the ship inspector: https://static1.e621.net/data/sample/ca/f9/caf9321275c65a01d90e750e0304ffc2.jpg

Rebecca, personal chef of the captains: (warning, tad voracious lol, and stuffing I guess, cuz she had a big belly whenever I tested so… yeah. Good hugger tho.https://static1.e621.net/data/sample/a1/48/a1484c4f173b7f18eacca5c17115d50e.jpg)

Felyca, head of security: (This, but more muscular and taller) ((and without that single horn))

Ozias, head gardener of The Mothership's greenery: (art is by Teranen)

2/4/2024: Reworked Vela. A lot... I saw art of Kodama (by ZHADART) I realised Vela was mid, so I put the old one down and changed the appearance.

Vela, the head of generator repairs: https://static1.e621.net/data/sample/28/98/289836a15e22e7a9d74c7c29d4806d4b.jpg

https://static1.e621.net/data/08/00/08009fb0c4362ccd712bcaee2200fd40.jpg

Yes i like Kodama's design, how'd you know?(Vela’s also hella kinky sometimes. Pulled out anal beads during one of my tests.)

As for Ignis, Sasha and Henrietta... Read their descriptions in the personality and it's up to imagination...

due to the update, the images are hidden. Not sure which ones are affected, but I know that most are likely hidden, but luckily, I was feeling less lazy, so links to the images for all!
creator: bibblebobmunks
